text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
"All right, you guys handle the start. All you gotta do is hold 
the white team off. I'll take it from there. Once they're all 
tired out, I'll blow 'em all away in one go!"

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
……Is what I'd usually do. But I get the feeling Fuji-san's 
already seen right through that plan.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: You sure? I think that strategy fits us pretty well… But you really think so?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. She watches me super close, 
so she seriously knows me well. ——Always has.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: ——Makes sense. Your mentor's a real superstar, ain't she.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Damn straight. 
Anyway, she's gonna know what I'm up to, so——

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna turn that around on her. 
…Here's the plan!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
I believed you were gonna do this, Fuji-san. 
'Cuz I've been watching you as long as I can remember.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: So I know. You've been watching me just as much. Everything I am is reflected in your heart.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
——And that's why… 
I'm gonna overcome the other me in your heart! 
And be even stronger than the strongest!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: We're ending this! ——It's OUR turn for a sneak attack!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: N-no way, they read Fuji-san's strategy like a book——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, actually, hang on!? 
How'd they know I was going to be one ambushing them…?

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, don't leave me hangin'. 
Are you really gonna keep shooting down my love?

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Your plan was to sneak through the chaos, and try to take down our helmsman with a sneak attack!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
I know better than anyone that you're the only person who 
could pull that off!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
You might think you were real good at hiding, 
but I saw everything, Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
I'd never let a treasure as shiny as you escape my sight! 
All right——

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Now—you're mine! This is just the start—— It's about time you start looking my way, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Bwah…? Hwauh… Huwahuhaasdaafahu…!??

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Forget the sneak attacks. How about we have a good ol'-fashioned face-off? See, I'm one greedy pirate.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
And taking a hero like you down is one fabulous treasure! 
I want it so, so bad it's driving me crazy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Auauauuaiaiui… 
Ta… Tap-shan——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Oh no, she's close. Oh no, she's hawt. I'm literally simping so hard right now, no I'm literally DYING so hard right now!! …Wait… No… But… Erm——)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (She really… sees me that way?——)

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
W-what a shocking conclusion!! 
The red team perfectly countered the white team's 
brilliant ambush plan!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Captain Jungle Pocket strikes down Fuji Kiseki, claiming 
victory in the war games! That's a huge amount of points 
for the red teaaaaam!!!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
——All right. 
We're gettin' close to the halfway point, Fuji-san.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Next is the cheer-off. 
You watch me closely up there, all right? 
…Like you always do.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Pokke…

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, all you fans in the crowd! The wait is over! 
It's time for the cheer-off, with every member of both 
teams competing!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Starting with the red team, led by Jungle Pocket! 
Get ready for a powerful performance!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: RED TEAM CHEER SQUAD!

text_block_list.name: Red Team
text_block_list.text: OSU!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
THREE, THREE, SEVEN, HUT!! 
ON MY MARK!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
TEAR! IT! UP! (OSU!) HEARTS! ON! FIRE!! (OSU!!) 
VICTORY IS BURNING RED!! (YEAH!!)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
STEEL! YOUR! SOUL!! (OSU!!) NEVER! BACK! DOWN!! (OSU!!) 
BREAK THROUGH IT ALL, STRONGEST RED!! (HEY!!)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: (……Fuji-san.)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Can you hear me? Fuji-san?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ……I hear you, Pokke. Of course I do.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha. 
……Hey, Fuji-san——

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
I didn't turn out anything like you after all, huh? 
The way we run, the like… the color of our soul… 
We're two totally different people.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ……We are.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: But still. You've always been the one I looked up to. The only reason I am who I am now… is because you were you.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
My heart is full to the brim with you. 
Full of everything you gave me, everything you passed down…

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
——I found the strength to run because… 
Because the fire you lit in me never stopped burning.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
——I could thank you and thank you and it'd never be enough! 
Words can't express how much I owe you! But I still I wanna 
thank you, more than anyone else… And I wanna do it right.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: That's why… Today, I'm going to surpass you.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: (That's the most awesome thing I can do for you, isn't it?)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, white team!! And Captain Fuji Kiseki!! 
We're gonna kick your asses today!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: RED TEAM'S! THE STRONGEEEEST!!
